question: Do all three channels (manual, CSV, E*TRADE) write into a single append-only, time-stamped Balance Observation log per Holding — each row recording an as-of date plus EITHER a share quantity (marketable, af999d56 kind a) OR a dollar balance (proxy/fixed, kinds b/c) — with the Holding's 'current' value being just the latest observation, rather than ingestion overwriting a single mutable current-state field?
